theme: Sunday Funday Finals — World Cup Semifinal Hype

characters_today.name: LADY E
characters_today.appearance: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture
characters_today.role_today: The referee of good fortune — she sets the rules and the rewards. Her whistle blows and the prizes fly.

characters_today.name: LUCKY LOU
characters_today.appearance: Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers plus a small soccer ball sticker, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, always holding or near a 4-leaf clover
characters_today.role_today: The lovable fan who almost gets knocked out all day but comes roaring back in the final minutes to win big.

characters_today.name: THE GOLDEN DEALER
characters_today.appearance: Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, gold-edged card deck, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and lips, completely still
characters_today.role_today: Mystery midnight drop announcer. Speaks only once — at Golden Hour.

new_player_bonus.copy_brief: Welcome offer. 'You belong here.' Warm, inviting. Lady E extends a hand of welcome. Ref whistle as invitation, not warning.

daily_bonus_wheel.copy_brief: Spin reminder. 'Resets at midnight.' Lucky Lou holding a spinning wheel trophy with soccer ball spinning in the center.

referral_code.copy_brief: REF-FINALS-847. 'Tell a friend, you both win.' Penalty Kick Free Spin — share code, friend joins, both get a free spin bonus.

daily_bonus.copy_brief: Quick reminder. 'Claim it before the day resets.' Golden Dealer silent — holds up a single gold coin as clock ticks in background.

today_special_bonus.copy_brief: Golden Boot Jackpot — biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus. 'Score the biggest. Win the boot.' Theme-exclusive, urgent, double-posted.

deals.name: Golden Boot Jackpot
deals.mechanic: Biggest single recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus. One winner. Biggest score takes the boot.
deals.tagline: Score the biggest. Win the boot.

deals.name: Hat Trick Bonus
deals.mechanic: 3 recharges during afternoon match-hour window = stacked bonus on all three.

deals.name: Penalty Kick Free Spin
deals.mechanic: Share referral code REF-FINALS-847. Friend joins = both get free spin bonus.
deals.tagline: Pass it. They score. You both win.

deals.name: Halftime Reload
deals.mechanic: Mystery midnight drop for all active players. Amount revealed at 10PM. 'The second half always surprises.'

act_1.name: THE OPENING — Match Day Energy Arrives
act_1.theme_note: World Cup semifinal week begins. England vs Argentina hype is everywhere. Lady E calls the opening whistle.

posts.title: Opening Whistle
posts.brief: Lady E blows her gold whistle to open the day. Gold confetti rains down. Soccer ball transforms into spinning gold casino chip. Energy is electric. Stadium crowd roar fades into casino ambiance.

posts.title: Lucky Lou's Match Day Fit
posts.brief: Lucky Lou in full WC jersey, fishing hat with soccer ball sticker, showing off his mismatched lucky socks. Holding a 4-leaf clover and a casino chip in each hand. Huge grin. Dark emerald background with gold stadium lighting.

posts.title: Semifinal Countdown Story
posts.brief: Lady E pointing at a gold countdown graphic: 'England vs Argentina. Wednesday. 3PM ET. Who are you backing?' Engagement poll built into story.

act_2.name: THE WELCOME — New Players, Big Energy
act_2.theme_note: Welcome new players using World Cup arrival energy. Every new player is joining the team.

posts.title: New Player Bonus — Join the Team
posts.brief: Lady E in referee dress, arms wide open in a welcoming gesture, standing at the entrance to a glowing dark-green casino floor with gold field markings on the floor like a soccer pitch. Gold spotlight from above. 'You belong here.'

posts.title: Lucky Lou Almost Win Story 1
posts.brief: Lucky Lou reacting with wide eyes as he misses a spin by one — '😅 Almost! But my luck is BUILDING...' Comic panel style.

posts.title: Hat Trick Bonus Teaser
posts.brief: Lady E holding up three fingers with a knowing smile. 'Something big drops at 3PM. Stay ready.' Gold clock in background.

act_3.name: THE GOLDEN RUSH — Deal Reveals + Referral Push
act_3.theme_note: Peak afternoon window. Hat Trick Bonus activates at 3PM. Referral code push. Golden Boot Jackpot reminder.

posts.title: Referral Code — Penalty Kick Free Spin
posts.brief: Lady E and Lucky Lou side by side, Lady E holding a gold penalty spot marker, Lucky Lou holding a referral card reading REF-FINALS-847. Dark emerald background with gold goal net raining coins. 'Pass it. They score. You both win.'

posts.title: Referral Groups Post
posts.brief: Same visual as 07, repurposed for Groups with engagement prompt. 'Drop your code in the comments — who's joining the team today?'

posts.title: Golden Boot Jackpot Launch
posts.brief: Lady E holding a glowing gold boot trophy. Below her: casino chips stacked like a penalty spot. Dark green floor. Stadium floodlights as casino spotlights from above. Single spinning chip on penalty spot in foreground. No text in image.

posts.title: Golden Boot Jackpot Story
posts.brief: Same energy as 08 but portrait crop. Lady E closer to camera, whistle raised, gold boot trophy glowing beside her.

posts.title: Hat Trick Bonus Celebration Reel
posts.brief: Lucky Lou pumps his fist as three gold casino chips appear one by one — first chip, second chip, third chip = explosion of gold confetti and coins. Soccer ball spins into frame and transforms into the third chip. 15-second reel. Pure hype energy.

act_4.name: JACKPOT PARADE — Community Wins + Bonus Reminder
act_4.theme_note: Evening prime time. Community celebration posts. Bonus wheel and daily bonus reminders.

posts.title: Community Wins Feed
posts.brief: 4-5 diverse players celebrating together in a dark emerald VIP lounge with gold accents. Soccer jerseys mixed with casino-chic outfits. Gold coins in the air. Stadium atmosphere in the background through large windows. Joy, community, celebration. No real team jerseys.

posts.title: Daily Bonus Story
posts.brief: Golden Dealer silently holds up a single gold coin. Clock behind him shows time ticking. No words. Pure tension and elegance.

posts.title: Daily Bonus Wheel Story
posts.brief: Lucky Lou spinning an oversized gold wheel with a soccer ball at its center. 'Spin before midnight! Resets at midnight sharp!' Expression: pure excitement.

act_5.name: GOLDEN HOUR — Mystery Drop + Lucky Lou Wins + Tomorrow Tease
act_5.theme_note: Halftime Reload mystery drop. Lucky Lou finally wins big. Tease tomorrow's content.

posts.title: Halftime Reload Announcement
posts.brief: Golden Dealer steps forward — for the first time, he speaks one sentence. 'The second half always surprises.' Gold burst of light. Mystery drop visual: a wrapped prize box with gold glow.

posts.title: Lucky Lou Wins — Final Whistle Reel
posts.brief: Lucky Lou's character arc payoff: after a day of near-misses, he scores the big win as final whistle blows. He leaps into the air, gold coins and confetti explode, his 4-leaf clover glows gold. Soccer ball transforming into a jackpot explosion. Triumphant. 15-20 seconds.

posts.title: Tomorrow Tease Story
posts.brief: Lady E smiles knowingly at camera, one finger to her lips, whistle in hand. Gold countdown hourglass beside her. 'Monday's coming. And Lady E never loses on a Monday...' Dark, atmospheric, cinematic.

song_of_the_day.title: Golden Kick
song_of_the_day.instruments: Afrobeat guitar loop, trap hi-hats, booming 808 kick, brass stabs, crowd chant layer, marimba melody, gold coin sound FX on beats 2 and 4

lyrics.intro: Uh, Lady E Luck... yeah... World Cup Sunday... we came to WIN...
lyrics.verse_1:
Sunday mornin', whistle blow
Dark green casino, golden glow
Lucky Lou lace up his shoes
England Argentina, pick your crew
But in here we don't pick sides
We just ride the golden tide
Every spin is a corner kick
Every win comes real, real quick
lyrics.pre_chorus:
Stack it up, stack it up
Hat trick by three
Bonus drop, bonus drop
Come play with Lady E
Golden boot in your hands
Feel that stadium crowd
When the whistle blow loud
We celebrate PROUD
lyrics.chorus:
Golden kick, golden kick
Lady E Luck is the place to be
Score big, score big
This Sunday energy is FREE
Spin that wheel, feel the thrill
Halftime reload, midnight fill
Golden kick, golden kick
We don't stop till the morning still
lyrics.verse_2:
Lucky Lou almost missed again
But that clover said 'my friend'
'This your time, this your night'
Third recharge and the win in sight
Golden Dealer tip his hat
No words needed, that's a fact
When the final whistle ring
Lady E Luck brings everything
lyrics.bridge:
Dai Dai, we ride
Stadium lights in our eyes
Coins fallin' from the sky
We don't need to ask why
Just spin it, claim it
The Golden Hour — don't miss it
Ref blow the whistle
We already finished
lyrics.final_chorus:
Golden kick, golden kick
Lady E Luck is the place to be
Score big, score big
This Sunday energy is FREE
Spin that wheel, feel the thrill
Halftime reload, midnight fill
Golden kick, golden kick
We don't stop till the morning still
lyrics.outro: Lady E Luck... Sunday Funday Finals... Golden Boot Jackpot all day long... REF-FINALS-847... bring a friend... you BOTH win... Aye...

voice_lines.text: Sunday. Semifinal week. The whole world is watching — and Lady E Luck is READY. Your Golden Boot Jackpot is live all day. Biggest play wins the boot. Let's go.

Three recharges between three and six? That's my hat trick baby! Stack 'em all up — Lady E Luck gives you the bonus on every single one. I ALMOST missed it... but you know what? Lucky Lou NEVER misses twice!
Your code is REF-FINALS-847. Share it. They join. You both get a free spin bonus. That's the Penalty Kick play — and everybody wins when you pass it right.
